title: 8-hour water cut for Gampaha
body_lines: COLOMBO (News 1st); The National Water Supply and Drainage Board says that the water supply to several areas in the Gampaha town will be suspended for 8-Hours from 10.00 PM today (22) to 6.00 AM tomorrow (23).

Accordingly, the water supply to Hansagiri Road on the Gampaha Miriswatta Road, Hansagiri Road on the Yakkala Road, the Black Bridge on the Oruthota Road, and the bridge near the Sathosa on the Udugampola Road will be suspended during the relevant period.
In addition, the Water Supply and Drainage Board says that the water supply to the section up to the Emission Testing Center on Ja-Ela Road will also be suspended during the relevant period.
Petrol shipment delayed; Limited distribution today (23) & tomorrow (24)
